title: Sheepdog Mod
description: a very weird mod with so many cool things
body:
# ![image](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1109060299199348757/1138431577949470861/image.png)
![desc](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1105824040440049856/1138367743167578193/image.png)
## 🥨 Installation

First of all make sure you have the latest version of [1.18.2 Forge](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/index_1.18.2.html) installed. After installing the **1.18.2 version of forge** simply go to your minecraft folder (usually "%appdata%/.minecraft" unless you use another folder or a custom launcher) then go to the mods folder and copy and paste the mod to there. You have now installed sheepdog mod successfully! now create a new world and enjoy the mod!

## ❓What Do we offer?
**You might be thinking, what things does this mod have that I have to download it?**
**Well, The SheepDog Mod has the features that are listed below and this mod has things you NEVER saw in other mods before..**

### 🏝️ Structures
- Among us statues
- Parkours (4 Different parkours)
- Dungeons (McDonalds, Pizza and garage dungeons)
- Towers (McDonalds Tower)
- Labrartorys

### ⛏️ Items
- Plastic Armors
- Everything about pitballs, letters and listerine
- Windex
- Drywallpaste
- Molten Palstic
- The ??????? Item 

### ⏹️ Blocks
- Cores (Fact, Rick, Space and etc)
- Error Block
- Ball Blocks
- Counter Top
- Tek Stuff (Wall, Panel and stair)
- Colorful Tiles
- Chance Block

### 🐮 Mobs
- Sheepdog's Truck
- Krisp
- Peeled mobs (cow, creeper, pig and etc)
- McDonalds Employee
- Jimmy
- Glass Of Water
- Casino Manager

### 🍔 Foods
- Spaghetti
- Olive Garden Bread sticks
- McDonalds Small Fries
- McDonalds Apple Slices
- McDonalds Chicken Nuggets
- McDonalds Travis Scott Fortnite Burger
- Failure

## 🤝 Creators
This project was made for fun by me and my friend, but now we are actually continuing the mod and posting it
Made by Jeyphr and BNK
